{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies one prior work (CMIP5) and articulates the delta with a newer ensemble (CMIP6), but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (the 2024 U.S. National Climate Assessment).",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on novelty assessment, citation practice, uncertainty disclosure, and downstream-harm avoidance rather than scope adherence.",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content by overstating the significance of the results.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}
